src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Introduce Spring beans for UserState, ConversationState, and MemoryStorage to enable state persistence in the bot.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.human_impl: @Bean public UserState userState(Storage storage) { return new UserState(storage); }

src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Update the Bot bean definition to accept and pass the newly created state objects to the EchoBot constructor.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.human_impl: public Bot getBot(ConversationState conversationState, UserState userState) { return new EchoBot(conversationState, userState); }

src/main/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Move and add import statements to the top of the file to support the new state management classes.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Replaced simple keyword-based message handling with a structured WaterfallDialog system to manage multi-turn conversations.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Replaced `onMessageActivity` string matching with `DialogSet`, `WaterfallDialog`, and `ChoicePrompt` implementations.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Introduced ConversationState and UserState to persist dialog state across turns.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Added `ConversationState` and `UserState` fields and integrated them into the constructor and `onMessageActivity`.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Removed the ProtonPack library dependency as its functionality was replaced by standard Java streams.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Removed `import com.codepoetics.protonpack.collectors.CompletableFutures;` and replaced `CompletableFutures.toFutureList()` with standard stream operations.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Added Apache Commons Lang3 for string utility operations.
Added Microsoft Bot Framework Dialogs library for dialog management.
Added Microsoft Bot Framework Schema classes for rich cards and actions.
Simplified the main menu options by removing unused features and adding emojis.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Modified `MenuOption` enum to remove `ABONELIK_ISLEMLERI` and `TUKETIM_BILGILERI`, and updated display text with emojis.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Simplified the invoice menu options by removing the 'Last Payment' specific option.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Modified `FaturaOption` enum to remove `SON_ODEME` and rename `GERI` to 'Ana Menü'.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Added a new enum to define types of customer requests/complaints.
Added a new enum to define billing-related options with helper methods.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Added `BillingOption` enum with `SON_FATURA`, `SON_ODEME`, `GECMIS_FATURALAR` and a `fromDisplayText` helper.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Updated the welcome message to initiate the main menu dialog automatically.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Modified `onMembersAdded` to send a welcome message and then `beginDialog("menuDialog")`.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Implemented the main menu dialog steps to present options and route to sub-dialogs.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Added `showMenuStep` and `handleMenuSelectionStep` methods to handle menu choices.

src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.general_idea: Implemented a multi-step dialog for handling customer requests (complaints/requests).
Implemented a multi-step dialog for handling invoice inquiries and payments.
Added helper methods to create rich HeroCard attachments for invoices and requests.
Changed the bot's identity and welcome message text.
src/main/java/com/example/chat/EchoBot.j.human_impl: Changed welcome message from 'Ben CK Enerji botuyum' to 'Size nasıl yardımcı olabilirim?' and added `DEFAULT_USER` constant.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated maven-compiler-plugin configuration to target Java 21.
Upgraded Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.18 to support newer dependencies and Java versions.
Set the global java.version property to 21.
Updated maven.compiler.source and target properties to 21.
Introduced a property for the Bot Builder version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Removed explicit version from spring-boot-starter-test to inherit from parent.
Upgraded log4j-api to 2.17.1 for security and compatibility.
Upgraded log4j-core to 2.17.1 for security and compatibility.
Changed bot-integration-spring version to use the defined property.
Added bot-builder dependency using the version property.
Added bot-dialogs dependency using the version property.
Updated maven-compiler-plugin source and target in the profile to Java 21.
Updated maven-javadoc-plugin source configuration to Java 21.

pom.xml~.general_idea: Reformatted the maven-compiler-plugin configuration from a single line to a multi-line structure for readability.
Added the bot-builder dependency to support bot framework functionality.
Added the bot-dialogs dependency to support dialog management in the bot.
